HERMES Halzan 25 Two-Tone Cypress Green & Mint Green

Product Details:

Brand: Hermès

Model: Halzan 25

Material: Clémence Taurillon Leather
Clasps: Silver-tone metal (SHW)

Colors: Cypress Green and Mint Green
Stamp: Z (2021)

Included Accessories: Complete set (original box, dust bag, shoulder strap, etc.)

Design and Features:

This highly sought-after Halzan 25 features a stunning and rare two-tone combination. Less formal than classic black, it offers a chic, vintage, and artistic look. Known for its incredible versatility, this bag can be easily worn in six different ways (clutch, tote, shoulder bag, or crossbody bag) to suit any occasion.

Condition:
Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order to appreciate the details of this magnificent piece.
